programme.desc: Health+ Jujube Essence & Mulberry Puree are crafted as pure juices with no sugar, no water, and no preservatives. Each sachet delivers natural nourishment anytime, anywhere. Jujube helps boost energy, support immunity, improve sleep, and enhance women’s wellness, while mulberry provides rich antioxidants, improves eyes health, and promotes radiant skin.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 261
programme.desc: This La Gourmet Flame Electric Cooker provides you with the best of both worlds by combining a hot pot and grill in one appliance. Enjoy versatile meal preparation, whether you're simmering soups or grilling meats and vegetables!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 269
programme.desc: The OMRON Knee TENS is a drug-free, non-invasive device designed to relieve knee pain and stiffness using clinically proven TENS technology. Compact and easy to use, it delivers gentle electrical pulses that stimulate nerves and improve blood circulation, helping to reduce pain from arthritis, injury, or overuse. With customizable intensity levels and ideal for daily use at home or on the go.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 236
programme.desc: Energy-saving, no-fire thermal cooker preserves nutrients, prepare in the morning, enjoy a hot meal later.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 308
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including Gymnema, Mulberry and Green Tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 284
programme.desc: QSAI Knee Supporter Collagen, cumulative sales exceed 50 million pieces as of Jan 2024, delivers highly absorbable collagen peptides, Hyaluronic Acid, and Chondroitin to nourish joints and cartilage, relieve joint pain. Its tasteless, odorless powder blends effortlessly into any food or drink, making it perfect for daily joint care, especially for those who prefer not to take pills.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 295
programme.desc: Developed by the Yi Si Yuan Medical Consultant Team, specially designed for respiratory health, strengthen immunity. programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 222
programme.desc: Slice, dice, and chop like a pro with our kitchen knives!

programme.title: The Wonder Shop - EP 244
programme.desc: A plant-based protein nutritional drink that ensures a balanced intake of nutrients, promoting visible improvements in muscle health, immune resilience, eye health, and digestion.

programme.title: No.17 Music Live House S2 - EP 3 17号音乐仓库 (第二季)
programme.desc: Five popular musicians, Liang Long, Hu Xia, Bai Jugang, Curly G, and Huang Zihongfan, reversed their image as singers and served as Live House staff, starting this music journey again with a new attitude. At the same time, with the new slogan "There is always happiness to speak out", the program will witness more beauty and surprises in the music they deliver to the audience.

After hearing Bi An's name, Bi De realised that Bi An is his great grandfather, which explains why they look so much alike. Bi An does not believe him.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 75 火鸟2020
programme.desc: Zhengmin finds Zhi-en's wedding ring on the kitchen floor and realises she may be in danger. At the police station, his concerns are dismissed as the officer insists that she merely stepped out after an argument with her husband.

programme.title: Phoenix 2020 - EP 76 火鸟2020

programme.title: Have A Nice Dream 2025 - EP 12 上山下海过一夜
programme.desc: The Yanshan Trail in Sanxia, New Taipei, is a classic route rich in cultural and historical value — a perfect living fossil journey for travelers. Sanxia’s history dates back to the late Ming and early Qing dynasties, when Han settlers began cultivating the land and forming a bustling market town. Time has passed, yet many century-old buildings remain, preserving its charm.

programme.title: River Monsters: Amazon Titanic - River Monsters: Amazon Titanic
programme.desc: It was supposed to be the safest boat in the Amazon, but when Sobral Santos II sank by the remote town of Obidos on the night of September 21st 1981 more than 300 people died. What had laid into the passengers?

programme.title: River Monsters - Killers from the Abyss (Part 2)
programme.desc: Fishing detective, Jeremy Wade, continues the biggest investigation of his career.

programme.title: River Monsters - Canadian Horror
programme.desc: The hunt for a 20-foot lake monster that attacks humans in Canada's wilderness.

programme.title: River Monsters - Razorhead
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates reports of a creature terrorizing the Florida Keys.

programme.title: River Monsters - The Mutilator
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to Papua New Guinea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Return of the Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Could the original River Monster be back from the brink and back in business?

programme.title: River Monsters - Alaskan Horror
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes into the forbidding Alaskan wilderness to visit two large lakes.

programme.title: River Monsters - Rift Valley Killer
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade is on a quest to Africa's Great Rift Valley.

programme.title: River Monsters - Body Snatcher
programme.desc: Jeremy is convinced a river monster is at large after hearing tales of a body-snatching.

programme.title: River Monsters - Devil of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy goes on a dangerous mission where he discovers a deep-sea devil.

programme.title: River Monsters - Asian Slayer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Himalayas to investigate river attacks.

programme.title: River Monsters - Chainsaw Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in the Australian outback trying to catch the rare freshwater sawfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Congo Killer
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Congo River on the trail of the legend of the spirit Mami Wata.

programme.title: River Monsters - Hidden Predator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to South Africa, where the biggest bull shark ever recorded was caught.

programme.title: River Monsters - Jungle Terminator
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates three mysterious deaths in the remote western Amazon.

programme.title: River Monsters - Japanese Horrors
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Japan on the trail of the kappa, a fish about which legends abound.

programme.title: River Monsters - Phantom Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade returns to Australia's Fitzroy River on his toughest quest yet.

programme.title: River Monsters - Electric Executioner
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is in Brazil in search of a fish that has already killed three cowboys.

programme.title: River Monsters - Piranha
programme.desc: Are the stories of piranha attacks on humans just myth and imagination?

programme.title: River Monsters - Death Ray
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade goes to Thailand in search of the 700lb giant freshwater stingray.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killer Snakehead
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates whether the snakehead deserves its fearsome reputation.

programme.title: River Monsters - Mongolian Mauler
programme.desc: In Mongolia, Jeremy Wade investigates a rare giant fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Terror in Paradise
programme.desc: Jeremy investigates tales of a mysterious shark-octopus hybrid called the Lusca.

programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea
programme.desc: Jeremy goes behind the scenes and we see what went into the making of a season at sea.

programme.title: River Monsters - Silent Assassin
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade travels to the Parana River in Argentina.

programme.title: River Monsters - European Maneater
programme.desc: Biologist and extreme angler Jeremy Wade investigates tales of a man-eating catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Freshwater Shark
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade investigates the myth of the freshwater shark.

programme.title: Alive Or Preferably Dead
programme.desc: Two brothers, Monty and Ted, will inherit $300,000 if they manage to live together for six months.

programme.title: Beyond Justice
programme.desc: Ex-C.I.A. Agent Tom Burton (Rutger Hauer) goes to Morocco with businesswoman Christine Sanders (Carol Alt) to rescue her son, the kidnapped heir to a desert fortune.

programme.title: Twin Dragons
programme.desc: Jackie Chan plays a dual role as twins separated at birth who grow up and cross paths. Two brothers, one becomes a famous conductor and pianist in New York, another becomes a racecar driver and bodyguard in Hong Kong. When the conductor travels to Hong Kong to give a concert, the twins get caught up in each other's business, about which they are anything but experts.

programme.desc: In 19th century Holland, a professor of fine arts and an unlicensed surgeon run a secret lab where the professor's ill daughter receives blood-transfusions from kidnapped female victims who posthumously become macabre art.

programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it.

programme.title: The Dirty Seven
programme.desc: Emanuelle is trapped in the middle of a brutal war, as both sides set out to claim her. Unfortunately for them, Emanuelle is not only beautiful but quite intelligent and uses her charms to seduce the soldiers to gain an advantage.

programme.title: Football Stars - Kante And Ramos - EP7
programme.desc: N'Golo Kanté has won the biggest prizes over the past few seasons, but he remains humble. Sergio Ramos has won a lot of prizes during his career, but he is known for his lack of discipline. In this episode we celebrate the two extremities.

programme.title: Chill - Freeride and Crashed Ice - EP13
programme.desc: Chill takes on the difficult task of being a judge of the Freeride World Tour. The Crashed Ice Series brings the Ice Cross descent right in the middle of St Paul in Minnesota.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Conquering - EP14
programme.desc: Since Marta erupted on the football field, she has proved that she can do what the men do, and the Laureus World Sports Awards present some of the most inspiring athletes in the world….

programme.title: Invincible - Lance Armstrong - EP39
programme.desc: Lance Armstrong was the icon of the Tour de France, until he became the undisputed champion of cheats.

programme.title: The Iconic - Golf's Ups & Downs - EP42
programme.desc: Rory Mcllroy, Lorena Ochoa, Michelle Wie, Tiger Woods and Phil Mickelson are all icons in the world of golf.

programme.title: Football Nation - Uruguay - EP6
programme.desc: Uruguay was the most important football nation at the beginning of the 20th century.

programme.title: Football Nation - Germany - EP1
programme.desc: Germany is the footballing nation which most regularly excels.

programme.title: Football Nation - Portugal - EP5
programme.desc: Portugal is a historic footballing nation and now a factory for the football elite.

programme.title: Football Nation - Concacaf - EP8
programme.desc: The CONCACAF region is rich and varied, and dominated by Mexico.

programme.title: Football Nation - Australia - EP7
programme.desc: Australia is one of the most confusing of footballing nations.

programme.title: Football Nation - Qatar - EP10
programme.desc: Qatar has, overnight, become a significant footballing nation.

programme.title: Football Stars - Klopp Statues and Tattoos - EP8
programme.desc: Jurgen Klopp has shown that you don't have to be grumpy to be a successful manager. Meanwhile, in footballing culture there are many ways to support a player or a team, from tattoos to statues, up to becoming a lookalike.

programme.title: Chill - Freeride World Tour - EP14
programme.desc: Chill presents spectacular action from Chamonix in France, the cradle of European freestyle in the high mountains. Landgraf, in Holland, organises the last leg of the Crashed Ice World Tour and Freeski Big Air from Zurich's Lakeside.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Setting Sail - EP15
programme.desc: Molly Meech and Alex Maloney, the two New Zealand sailors, set course for the Tokyo Olympic Games. Russian high jumper Mariya Lasitskene has some arguments to put forward.

programme.title: Invincible - Jack Niclaus - EP40
programme.desc: Jack Nicklaus has not only won more major championships than any other golfer, but he has also transformed this sport.

programme.title: The Iconic - Icons of Cricket - EP58
programme.desc: With a bat and a ball, the West Indies cricket team, the 1983 World Cup Final, the ball of the century from Shane Warne and the Ashes are all… emblematic.

programme.title: Chill - Mandurah Women's Wakeboarding - EP15
programme.desc: The best of women's wakeboard with the coming of the IWWF to Mandurah in Australia. The magnificent Italian island of Sicily welcomes the kitesurf world tour. And finally, incredible female surfers head for the beaches of Brazil for the Rio Pro.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Believers - EP16
programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, we deal with athletes who have never given up.

programme.title: Invincible - Brazil - EP41
programme.desc: Brazil has won the World Cup five times and has produced some of the greatest footballers of all time.

programme.title: The Iconic - Icons of Winter - EP61
programme.desc: They are the icons of the winter games, notably female skier Mikaela Shiffrin, ice skater Tonya Harding, Britain's Eddie the Eagle and the miraculous United States ice hockey team.

programme.title: Football Nation - Uruguay - EP6
programme.desc: Uruguay was the most important football nation at the beginning of the 20th century.

programme.title: Football Nation - Germany - EP1
programme.desc: Germany is the footballing nation which most regularly excels.

programme.title: Football Nation - Portugal - EP5
programme.desc: Portugal is a historic footballing nation and now a factory for the football elite.

programme.title: Football Nation - Concacaf - EP8
programme.desc: The CONCACAF region is rich and varied, and dominated by Mexico.

programme.title: Football Nation - Australia - EP7
programme.desc: Australia is one of the most confusing of footballing nations.

programme.title: Football Nation - Qatar - EP10
programme.desc: Qatar has, overnight, become a significant footballing nation.

programme.title: Football Stars - Bonucci Haircuts Pandev - EP9
programme.desc: Leonardo Bonucci is keeping the great tradition of Italian central defenders alive. Goran Pandev retires as a legend, and we discover the stars who pay as much attention to their hairstyles as their skills!

programme.title: Chill - Mandurah Men's Wakeboarding - EP16
programme.desc: We are on the waters of Mandurah, in Australia, for the men's finals of the IWWF Wakeboard World. Morocco is our next destination for the kitesurf world tour, and we present Harley Clifford who storms wakeboarding.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Winners Are Grinners - EP17
programme.desc: Simone Biles is the most decorated American gymnast and, despite the scandal surrounding the doctor Larry Nasser and US team, she is determined to contest the Tokyo Olympic Games.

programme.title: Invincible - Simone Biles - EP42
programme.desc: In the arena of gymnastics and beyond, Olympic gold medal winner Simone Biles has proven she was a champion worthy of the name.

programme.title: The Iconic - Icons of the Extreme - EP62
programme.desc: We look at the icons of extreme sports. Like cliff diver Rhiannan Iffland, stuntman Evel Knievel, skater Tony Hawk and mountain biker Nino Schurter.

programme.title: Karen on the Rock - Formula 1 - EP1
programme.desc: The Monaco F1 Grand Prix is a notable date in the calendar of the stars. Karen goes around with her mike and introduces you to the greatest drivers: Button, Rosberg and, of course, her husband!

programme.title: Karen on the Rock - Football Stars - EP11
programme.desc: Karen Minier – the wife of F1 champion David Coulthard – invites you to the heart of the most glamorous events in Monaco! Meet Cristiano Ronaldo, Thierry Henry and Zlatan Ibrahimovic!

programme.title: Karen on the Rock - Water Sports - EP12
programme.desc: Karen Minier - wife of F1 champion David Coulthard - takes you to meet stars of aquatic sports like diver Pierre Frolla, surfer Jordi Smith and kitesurf champion Alice Brunacci.

programme.title: Karen on the Rock - Most Successful Female Athletes - EP13
programme.desc: Join Karen Minier – wife of F1 champion David Coulthard – and meet the most in-form athletes of the moment, like Olympic heptathlon champion Jessica Ennis or multi-medal winning pole vaulter Yelena Isinbayeva.

programme.title: Karen on the Rock - Korea on the Rock - EP14
programme.desc: Karen Minier - the wife of F1 champion David Coulthard - invites you to the heart of the most glamorous events! To South Korea, with Mark Webber and Miles Daisher!

programme.title: Karen on the Rock - Track & Field - EP15
programme.desc: Karen Minier – the wife of F1 champion David Coulthard – invites you to the heart of the most glamorous events in Monaco! Between two shopping sprees, swim alongside Melanie Marshall and Steve Parry and train with Lolo Jones!

programme.title: Football Stars - Rapinoe Movies Varane - EP10
programme.desc: Megan Rapinoe fought against Donald Trump. Vinnie Jones attempted to break through in Hollywood. And after having tried their luck elsewhere, Cristiano Ronaldo and Antoine Griezmann have gone back where they belong.

programme.title: Chill - Snowboard Big Air - EP17
programme.desc: We look at the art of preparing a snowboard for freestyle in the big mountains, and we bring you spectacular action of this kind on skis from Chamonix, with the best moments of the finals of the Freeside World Tour.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Willpower - EP18
programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, we look at the athletes with the most desire.

programme.title: Invincible - Pep Guardiola - EP43
programme.desc: With his success at three great clubs, Pep Guardiola has been described as a genius of football.

programme.title: The Iconic - Super Bowl - EP1
programme.desc: Tom Brady is the best player in the NFL, Malcolm Butler has stolen the ball and made the big headlines of Super Bowl 49, while the Manning brothers have a unique Super Bowl history.

programme.title: Invincible - Lebron James 2016 NBA Finals - EP22
programme.desc: In 2016, Lebron James and his Cavs made history by taking the NBA titles after having been 3-1 behind the Warriors.

programme.title: The Iconic - Formula 1 - EP5
programme.desc: Ferrari is the best known F1 brand in the world, Lewis Hamilton is an icon of F1, just like the Monaco circuit, while Seb Vettel's year 2013 was a super season for F1.

programme.title: Sports Woman - The Sky's The Limit - EP27
programme.desc: The parachutist Amy Chmelecki inspires women around the world to break records. The Dutch Olympic champions Sanne Weavers and Sharon van Rouwendal shine with a thousand lights in Rio.

programme.title: Flashpoint - 1977 Duel in the Sun/ 2006 World Cup - EP16
programme.desc: During the 1977 Open Championship, two golfing legends faced off blow for blow. During the 2006 World Cup final, a footballing legend disgraced himself.

programme.title: Karen on the Rock - Italy on the Rock - EP17
programme.desc: Karen Minier - the wife of F1 champion David Coulthard - invites you to the heart of the most glamorous events! Meet two Italian champions, motorcycle legend Loris Capirossi and F1 driver Felipe Massa.

programme.title: Football’s Greatest Stage - Italy ‘82 - EP8
programme.desc: The politics has been dramatic, the sites superb and the football ahead of its time. The game would never be the same after Italy's victory in the 1982 World Cup.

programme.title: Football Stars - Tammy Abraham - EP11
programme.desc: Tammy Abraham has taken off to Roma, but in Spain, shares in Barcelona have reached a new low.

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep13 - EP113
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Whale of a Tale - EP118
programme.desc: An underwater treasure hunt quickly turns into a rescue operation.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep10 - EP110
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep10 - EP10
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Peace and Harmony - EP108
programme.desc: In this episode of Kids' Planet, we will make a trip to discover what two important words mean: "Peace" and "Harmony". Our friend Curious who knows everything will guide us through the universe of values, teaching us a very important quality in "Kindness", and we will learn to reject violence, manage anger, make good decisions, and have self-control.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Sports - EP119
programme.desc: In this episode, we will travel through the wonderful world of sports. We will learn the physical and mental benefits of practising a sport or physical activity. We will talk about the value of perseverance, training, and the importance of knowing how to win and how to lose. We will learn about different sports and disciplines and how to show respect to our opponents.

programme.title: Mellodees - You Are My Sunshine - EP7
programme.desc: It's story time! Dee and Teddy snuggle up with a good book before bed time. Sing-A-Long as they take you on an adventure in the jungle while reading the story of "You Are My Sunshine"!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep10 - EP110
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Watery Diversion - EP205
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight Nick Slick from building a dam to illegally move water downstream.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Attack of the 50 Foot Shaq - EP116
programme.desc: Shaq's friend, Keb, makes Shaq a special gift that's larger than life.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Electri-Kent / Fashion Genes - EP106
programme.desc: Kent discovers one of Edison’s secret inventions – an exo-bodysuit: a steampunk Ironman device that turns him into a klutzy superhero. / Ever-confident Nicky finds herself competing with Sheila in a “Project Runway”-type show, and, needing the perfect model to show off her designs on the runway, she decides to clone herself.

programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Habits - EP109
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that habits are the result of repeating good action until it becomes part of our routine. All of our activities are very important! That's why you should give a very special place for rest, for having fun, and for sharing with your friends and family. We will also learn about the importance of punctuality!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Love - EP120
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the value of love. We will understand that when we have love in our hearts, we care about the well-being of others, so we make them happy. Pets must also be treated with love and respect. The first step to accepting that we are unique is by loving ourselves. Respect is a big part of love and when love is in our heart, there is no place for negative feelings.

programme.title: Mellodees - Old MacDonald - EP8
programme.desc: Dee takes a trip to The Farm. Join him on this fun filled adventure and learn about the different sounds these cute little farm animals make. You might even see some familiar faces!

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep13 - EP113
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Ransacked Reef - EP206
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight Nick Slick from ruining the coral reefs in the Phillippines.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Whale of a Tale - EP118
programme.desc: An underwater treasure hunt quickly turns into a rescue operation.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - It Takes One to Grow One / Smells Like Teen Stink - EP107
programme.desc: JD's ultimate fertilizer is slowly turning him into a plant and it's up to the team to get him back to the lab in time to cure him! / When Kent's super B.O. makes him reluctant to appear on a prized comic con panel, the Secret Lab kids have to find a way to Stop the Stink.

programme.title: Mellodees - Wheels On The Bus - EP5
programme.desc: Dee rides the school bus on his way to class. Is that Marshmello driving the bus?

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep14 - EP114
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Terror Tubes Takedown | Episode 7
programme.desc: The Gang dives headfirst into the Fear Zone - and it’s pure chaos. With Nightmare Mode activated and the Fear Bomb ticking, only faith can light the way.

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | The Breath of Courage | Episode 8
programme.desc: With 60 seconds left, the Fear Bomb ticks toward doom. Kungfuda and God's Gang fight with faith and love - will light prevail or fear win?

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Alien Mayhem! | Episode 1, 2, 3
programme.desc: God’s Gang faces insane challenges - from stopping a mad scientist to battling aliens and saving blue whales.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Tyson the Tanker refuels Jeremy
programme.desc: Oh no, Jeremy ran out of gas! Troy selects the most perfect truck to refuel him: Tyson the Tanker!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Francis the Forklift helps at the construction site
programme.desc: Edgar made a mess at the construction site! Troy selects the best truck to help with the clean-up: Francis the Forklift!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Tyler the Tyke steals candy
programme.desc: Tyler stole some candy from Baby Francis! Troy selects the bravest, fastest car to stop him: Matt the Police Car!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Chuck the Cherry Picker saves the day!
programme.desc: There's a blackout in Car City! Troy selects the most ingenious truck to reconnect the cables: Chuck the Cherry Picker!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Carl the Super Truck helps Frank the Firetruck
programme.desc: A lost container sends Troy into investigation mode. Who and where did it come from? He's very helpful and can transform!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - The Babies' trip to the Moon
programme.desc: The Babies are fascinated by the moon! Troy selects the most cosmic truck to help them get there: Rocky the Rocket!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - QUACK-QUACK - SUPERJUMP! ROOKIE AND THE FROG
programme.desc: Rookie is sitting by a pond when he suddenly sees eyes staring at him from the water. Thinking of his friend the crocodile, he first keeps a safe distance, but then realizes that it is a cool frog that jumps out of the water and performs some awesome tricks. Rookie watches and tries to copy, and it doesn’t take too long to master such leaps, the frog being an excellent teacher. And when the frog finally falls, Rookie is fast enough to catch it and save it from harm.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - FLY, ROOKIE FLY! ROOKIE AND THE BIRD
programme.desc: Rookie is enjoying a sunny day when he spots a playful little bird drawing circles and shapes in the sky. Inspired to fly, Rookie climbs a tall tree to jump - but after a split second, the only way is down! Quickly, Rookie activates his parachute and lands safely. Although the bird is bursting with laughter, Rookie doesn‘t give u,p and with the help of a giant propeller, he manages to impress his new little friend.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - MOOOO WHO? ROOKIE AND THE BLIND COW
programme.desc: On his tour, Rookie discovers a small cow trapped in a pit and unable to escape on its own. He quickly rushes to its rescue and lifts it to safety. After helping the cow, Rookie realizes the cause of her fall: Very poor eyesight! Rookie presses a button, his body buzzing as he generates a pair of glasses. Rookie puts them on the little cow’s nose - and now she can see everything and even manages a high-fi ve to say goodbye before proudly taking off.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - PICTURE THIS! ROOKIE AND THE CAMERA
programme.desc: Rookie stumbles upon a device, picks it up, and as he goes to examine it, it flashes, and an instant picture comes out. Rookie is thrilled and immediately starts taking pictures of his entire surroundings from all sides and in all sorts of positions. Finally, he has a great idea: In his amazing new photo salon set up in a tent, photo artist Rookie will soon be waiting for all his friends to take wonderful portraits of them!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - BOOKS ARE MAGIC! ROOKIE AND THE LIBRARY
programme.desc: Rookie finds a large library and is fascinated and attracted by all the colorful books. He picks up the first book, but gets frightened when the smiling shark on the cover turns into a ravenous biter after only one page. He chooses another book with a clown’s face and laughs at the funny pictures inside, then one about astronauts and the moon, and another with beautiful landscapes, before he finds an empty, completely white book that gives him a whole new idea.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - DANCE WITH YOUR FRIENDS – ROOKIE THE DJ
programme.desc: On his hike, Rookie discovers a strange, shiny globe hanging from a tree. He gently taps it, and the ball immediately begins to spin, reflecting the light beautifully in all directions: A disco ball! Just behind i, the Rookie finds a DJ booth and soon the music starts and the party begins! Lights are flashing, and all his buddies show up to have a dance with their friends under the sparkling disco ball.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - MY SAND IS MY CASTLE! ROOKIE AND THE CRAB
programme.desc: Rookie enjoys a beautiful day by the sea, playing in the warm sand. He starts to build a sandcastle, which soon gets bigger and bigger soon and notices a crab, which is interested in his building and starts to explore it like his own house. There is a new idea! He presses a button and becomes as small as the little friend, and together they play games inside the sandcastle, before their fun is interrupted by a big wave.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - FRIENDS IN THE SKY, FRIENDS FLYING HIGH? ROOKIE AND THE CLOUDS
programme.desc: What could be better than a meadow of flowers on a beautiful day? Rookie is enjoying the sun and the beautiful blue sky, watching the clouds pass by - but wait! What‘s that? One of the clouds turns, and suddenly its shape reminds him of one of his friends! And who is that again? What a fun game to play! Rookie continues to search for clouds that remind him of his friends and their adventures together.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - El castillo de Robins
programme.desc: Como la lente no se puede recuperar, el Dr. No quiere fabricar otra, pero necesita petirrojos para ello. Así que ataca Rubidia, una región repleta de piedras preciosas. Pero Oxin, el rey de Rubidia, lo toma prisionero y lo encierra en el castillo donde también está Chip, ya que Oxin los obliga a trabajar como esclavos en sus minas. El Dr. No intenta convencer a Chip de que le devuelva la lente, pero Chip se niega. Más tarde, ambos logran escapar del castillo y el Dr. No persigue a Chip con su nave. Pero el chico atrapa al científico y también ayuda a liberar a los esclavos de Rubidia.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - La trampa de la armonica
programme.desc: Chip y sus amigos crean una zona con formaciones que se asemejan a instrumentos musicales y armonizan sus sonidos. De repente, quedan atrapados en un rectángulo de cristales de cuarzo que vibran al formar una trampa sónica. Un átomo músico, que los ha capturado, busca miembros para formar una orquesta. Los antimateriales están cerca y Chip le pide al músico que prepare la trampa para retenerlos y escapar. El músico acepta y los antimateriales se convierten en prisioneros, obligándolos a escuchar el terrible sonido de sus composiciones.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Aliens
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster merge into Robo and set a trap for a rogue UFO that's abducted baby cars from the beach.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Ghost Busting
programme.desc: Time to merge! A "ghost" has stolen cakes from the cake-eating competition, Rodeo and Booster get ready to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Missing Pipes
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster transform into Robo to catch Zitron after he steals Billy's pipes. Matilda the Police Car helps them.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Beach Rescue
programme.desc: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: Chefclub Kids

programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.desc: Zafir returns home only to find out that no one is there. He is furious with Farah when he finds out that she has told Lara the truth.

programme.title: 3 Dud - EP 7
programme.desc: Nobody is talking to one another. Nadya runs away from home and goes with Boy Sachok. Azman is franctic and asks Basyir and Ash to look for her with him.

programme.title: Tekan Minyak - EP 1
programme.desc: Tekan Minyak is a story that revolves around 5 women who call themselves "The Havana Girls". Each of them have their own episodes but they are bonded by the thread of friendship which is held by Zuraidah, the oldest of them. They all started their friendship when they were young from a religious class and after a short separation, they all unite back and the incidents that happen will be core of Drivers.

programme.title: Setulus Hati - EP 39
programme.desc: Setulus Hati tells the story of a pilot and flight attendant, Alvino and Rossa. Their marriage looks perfect and harmonious. But apparently, the presence of Lia, who is Rossa's best friend, actually becomes a thorn in Rossa and Alvino's marriage.

programme.title: Juara Memasak Senior Vs Junior - EP 3
programme.desc: Juara Memasak returns with a new spin, pitting youths against their senior counterparts. Can the seniors defeat the youths with their vast experience and knowledge, or will the youths edge the seniors out with their creativity and new innovations? The kitchen is set for the most exciting cook-off battle yet. Watch as they fight to win 25,000 and be crowned as the champion.

programme.title: Saat Aku Tahu (The Moment I Knew It) - EP 9
programme.desc: Ameena confronts Zarif about the affair and demands a divorce, but he begs for forgiveness. Maira refuses to leave him despite growing tension with Ameena. Meanwhile, Datuk Zaidi’s condition worsens as he continues to keep it hidden from Ameena.

programme.title: Dendam Aurora - EP 8
programme.desc: A note confirms Harris’s fears that Hakim was murdered and that Aurora may be the next target. He moves to hide her for protection, bringing them closer together. As old feelings resurface, Harris’s upcoming wedding to Putri Adrina is put at risk.

programme.title: Ai, Ai, Cef! - EP 3
programme.desc: In Ai, Ai, Cef!, kids take over the kitchen as head chefs and go head to head in the ultimate cook-off! But every chef needs an assistant, and in AI, AI, CEF, two stars will join our little chefs in their mission to improve the judges - but with their faces hidden behind masks. Who are these assistant chefs? In each episode, two well-known figures --- actors, singers, influencers, athletes, housing agents and more --- join the show as mystery guest.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ellixi Hair Tonic
programme.desc: Revitalize your hair with Ellixi Hair Tonic — your ultimate solution for stronger, healthier, and more vibrant locks. Infused with a powerful blend of natural botanical extracts, essential oils, and vital nutrients, Ellixi helps to promote growth, and helps reduce hair fall. Whether you're battling thinning, dryness, or dullness, this lightweight tonic nourishes the scalp and restores shine without leaving any residue. 护发要趁早！Ellixi打造更健康、更亮丽秀发。Ellixi 纯天然植物萃取、含精油和有助于护发的重要营养素，有助于促进头发生长，减少脱发。无论您是头发稀疏、干燥问题，或是希望保持浓密秀发，Ellixi都能帮助你滋养头皮，恢复秀发光泽，且不留任何残留。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Acerpure Water Purifier + Air Fryer
programme.desc: Upgrade your kitchen with the Acerpure Aqua WP5 Water Purifier and 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer—the ultimate duo for convenience and health. Enjoy instant 99°C hot and 5°C cold water, perfectly filtered with 5-in-1 RO & double UV sterilization, while the 2-in-1 Flip Air Fryer lets you air fry, grill, or make soup with a quick 180° flip. Both are easy to use, safe, and efficient—smarter cooking and cleaner drinking water, all in one kitchen setup. 厨房必备组合：Acerpure Aqua WP5 滤净水器搭配2合1翻转气炸锅，理想组合，健康又方便。随时享用 99°C 热水 / 5°C 冷水，水质纯净安全（5合1 RO+双重UV杀菌）；翻转气炸锅可轻松实现 空气炸、烤肉、煮汤。操作简单、安全高效，干净饮水与轻松烹饪，一台搞定厨房大小事！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Fissler Cookware Set
programme.desc: Elevate your kitchen with Germany-made Fissler Stardust Forte! programme.title: River Monsters - Secrets of the Sea

programme.title: River Monsters - American Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade visits tourist hotspots in the USA in search of river monsters.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killers from the Abyss (Part 1)
programme.desc: Fishing detective, Jeremy Wade, takes on the biggest investigation of his career.

programme.title: River Monsters - River Of Blood

programme.title: River Monsters - Malaysian Lake Monster

programme.title: River Monsters - Africa's Deadliest
programme.desc: Wildlife series. Jeremy Wade investigates the ferocious and carnivorous tigerfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Amazon Titanic

programme.title: River Monsters - Killer Torpedo
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade ventures deep into Central America in search of a killer fish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Legend of Loch Ness
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on a mission to track down the famous Loch Ness monster.

programme.title: River Monsters - Deep Sea Demon

programme.title: River Monsters - Volcanic Island Terror
programme.desc: On a volcanic Pacific island, an ancient fishing community is being terrorised.

programme.title: River Monsters - Colombian Slasher

programme.title: River Monsters - Invisible Executioner
programme.desc: Extreme angler Jeremy Wade travels to the Zambezi River in Africa.

programme.title: River Monsters - Vampires of the Deep
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade embarks on a punishing mission to the Pacific Northwest.

programme.title: River Monsters - Killer Catfish
programme.desc: Jeremy Wade is on the hunt for the notorious killer catfish.

programme.title: River Monsters - Atomic Assassin

programme.title: Red Sun
programme.desc: In 1870, a gang robs a train and steals a ceremonial Japanese sword meant as a gift for the U.S. President, prompting a manhunt to retrieve it.

programme.title: The Dirty Seven
programme.desc: Emanuelle is trapped in the middle of a brutal war, as both sides set out to claim her. Unfortunately for them, Emanuelle is not only beautiful but quite intelligent and uses her charms to seduce the soldiers to gain an advantage.

programme.title: Mill Of The Stone Women
programme.desc: In 19th century Holland, a professor of fine arts and an unlicensed surgeon run a secret lab where the professor's ill daughter receives blood-transfusions from kidnapped female victims who posthumously become macabre art.

programme.title: The Grasshopper
programme.desc: Christine Adams leaves her small town in British Columbia at age 19 to follow her boyfriend to L.A., where he works for a bank. She soon gets bored and moves to Las Vegas and becomes a showgirl, eventually slipping into prostitution.

programme.title: Hondo
programme.desc: Hondo is told to help make peace with Indian Chief Vittoro, whose daughter--Hondo's wife--had been killed by the Cavalry. Once the peace pipe is smoked, Hondo must deal with a renegade Native American who threatens the peace by randomly attacking settlers.

programme.title: Cyclone
programme.desc: After a surprise cyclone hits the area, tourists become stranded on a boat in the sea, and they have to do anything in order to survive. To make matters even worse, they're joined by the survivors of a plane crash and a sinking boat.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep1 - EP1
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Habits - EP109
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that habits are the result of repeating good action until it becomes part of our routine. All of our activities are very important! That's why you should give a very special place for rest, for having fun, and for sharing with your friends and family. We will also learn about the importance of punctuality!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Love - EP120
programme.desc: In this episode, we will learn about the value of love. We will understand that when we have love in our hearts, we care about the well-being of others, so we make them happy. Pets must also be treated with love and respect. The first step to accepting that we are unique is by loving ourselves. Respect is a big part of love and when love is in our heart, there is no place for negative feelings.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Forgiveness - EP110
programme.desc: In this episode, we will go on an expedition to the Planet of Forgiveness and learn that forgiveness is an act of love that helps us overcome anger and misunderstandings and that when we forgive we see things with more clarity. And most importantly, when we recognize our mistakes we realize the importance of asking for forgiveness through our hearts.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Differences - EP121
programme.desc: In this chapter, we will discover that culture is a way of life that is passed down from generation to generation, and through speaking of our differences we learn about other cultures. We will understand that putting ourselves in someone else's shoes means thinking about what they might be feeling, or what they might be struggling within their lives.

programme.title: Mellodees - Baa Baa Black Sheep - EP9
programme.desc: Join our dance party at The Farm. Dee shows the sheep how to get down.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep16 - EP116
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Flying Flyash - EP207
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team fight to stop Nick Slick from dumping fly ash into an old landfill.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - Gronk Did It! - EP120
programme.desc: A day volunteering at the Orlanta Animal Reserve turns into an ordeal as an elephant escapes its enclosure.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Monster Smash / A Monster of a Mystery - EP108
programme.desc: When JD and Kent's battle bot, Monster Smash, escapes from the lab, the Secret Lab Kids must navigate a maze to find it. / When JD and Kent believe that the dreaded Whomper is lurking outside the lab, Kent is terrified. JD hopes to become famous for discovering an unknown creature. The team must use science to determine if it's really a monster or if they can correctly classify it as some other animal.

programme.title: Mellodees - You Are My Sunshine - EP7
programme.desc: It's story time! Dee and Teddy snuggle up with a good book before bed time. Sing-A-Long as they take you on an adventure in the jungle while reading the story of "You Are My Sunshine"!

programme.title: Casper the Friendly Ghost - Casper the Friendly Ghost Ep15 - EP115
programme.desc: Depressed by the antics of the other ghosts, Casper leaves home to make friends. After unintentionally scaring several potential pals, Casper befriends two young children. They take him home, where Casper frightens their mother. Casper is again upset because he believes that he will always scare away his potential buddies. However, Casper scares away a banker who is coming to foreclose on the woman's house, and this wins her heart for Casper.

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Love is in the Airhole | Episode 3
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | What's Cooking | Episode 4
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Mystery Ally in the Flames | Episode 5
programme.desc: A forest trip turns into chaos when wildfire strikes! With no tech, the gang must unite to survive. Just when hope fades, a glowing hero appears. Who is it?

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Trials of KungFuda | Episode 6
programme.desc: A forest in flames. A rising fear. Enter Kungfuda, the mystery kicker who pushes God’s Gang to unlock their true power. Can the gang overcome fear and awaken as true Forest Guardians before darkness consumes it all?

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Ethan The Dumptruck helps Edgar move some sand.
programme.desc: Edgar needs help moving some mounds of sand! Troy selects the highest-capacity truck he knows: Ethan the Dumptruck!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Amber the Ambulance takes Katy to the hospital
programme.desc: Katy needs help; she's feeling sick! Troy selects the most helpful, kindest car he knows: Amber the Ambulance!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Ben the Tractor daves the day.
programme.desc: Oh no, there's bales of hay all over the highway! Troy selects the most helpful truck he knows: Ben the Tractor!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Hector the Helicopter rescues Suzy
programme.desc: Suzy had an accident and needs urgent help! Troy selects the most perfect vehicle to help rescue her: Hector the Helicopter!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Sam the Snowplough clears the streets
programme.desc: Lilly and Tom are stuck in the snow! Troy selects the most perfect truck for the job: Sam the Snowplough!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - OCTO-DANCE! ROOKIE AND THE OCTOPUS
programme.desc: Rookie is sitting on the shore, enjoying the sun, when he sees something repeatedly poking out of the water, sparking his curiosity. He puts on his underwater robot mask and dives into the ocean. At first, all he finds are rocks and coral, but suddenly, big, round eyes are staring at him from a gray rock. He flees in panic, but when he realizes that it is an octopus whose tentacles are tangled in plastic waste, he quickly frees his new friend from this unpleasant situation, and they dance happily together in the water

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - GAME ON? ROOKIE AND THE COMPUTER
programme.desc: Rookie comes across an office cubicle with a computer on the table and is immediately fascinated. He presses some keys, a little character appears on the screen, and a computer game starts. Very excited, Rookie continues to press different keys. When in the end he wins the race and earns a trophy, the computer suddenly takes Rookie‘s photo and prints it out. However, the printing doesn‘t stop, and soon the whole floor is covered with photos before Rookie finally manages to shut down the computer and stop the madness.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - LET IT BEEEEE! ROOKIE AND THE BEE
programme.desc: Rookie finds a wooden box, knocks on it, and then shakes it. What a bad idea! The whole swarm of bees chases him, and he has to hide in the bushes. After the swarm is gone, he finds a tired and exhausted bee on the ground. Rookie has the idea to rescue the little bee with a sugar cube. The whole beehive is grateful, and Rookie learns a lot about the work of these useful little friends.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - SNOWBALL EFFECT? ROOKIE AND THE POLAR BEAR
programme.desc: Rookie is happily stomping through the snow when he suddenly gets hit by several snowballs. A pair of cheeky polar bears try to engage him in a playful snowball fight. But Rookie outwits them by hiding in the snow, causing the bears to stumble and then get hit by his surprise robot snowball machine. After the snowy confusion turns to laughter, everyone shares a moment of fun and happiness.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - SPRING, SUMMER, FALL & WINTER - ROOKIE AND THE 4 SEASONS
programme.desc: From the window of his house Rookie watches the four seasons pass by and thinks of his friends and the great fun and adventures they had throughout the year: The bees that make everything bloom and the cheeky little ladybug in spring; a day at the beach, snorkeling with friends and a water battle in summer; fl ying kites, fun in the rain and his friend the squirrel getting ready in autumn and building snowmen, snowballs and sledding fun in winter.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - READY, SET, GO! ROOKIE AND THE RABBIT
programme.desc: Rookie is relaxing in the sun when something rushes past him, leaving him in a cloud of dust. Using his telescope, he spots a racing rabbit, and with the tasty prospect of a sweet carrot for the winner, he manages to persuade it to take part in a race. Ready – steady – and off they go: Even though the rabbit stumbles and Rookie has to help, they finish the race together, tumbling happily over the finish line.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - BALANCE IN PINK – ROOKIE AND THE FLAMINGO
programme.desc: On his stroll around a lake, Rookie spots a group of pink flamingos gracefully balancing on one leg. Curious, Rookie tries to imitate them and, after practicing a little, manages to do so quite well. But suddenly there‘s a loud splash and Rookie discovers a flamingo struggling to stand on one leg, falling over and over. Offering to help, Rookie comes up with an excellent idea - a pair of roller skates! And there, slowly but surely, the flamingo learns to skate gracefully like a ballerina and to balance on one leg as well.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - BOUNCE, REBOUND - SCORE! ROOKIE AND THE GIRAFFE
programme.desc: Rookie is out for a walk on a beautiful day when he suddenly hears a rhythmic sound in the distance. Curious as always, he goes out to investigate and finds a young giraffe playing basketball, skillfully dribbling and bouncing the ball into a basketball hoop high in the trees. Of course, Rookie wants to join in, but he has a few things to learn before their first game. In the end, they impress each other with their skills and tricks.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - Las tierras raras
programme.desc: LMN's

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - El desierto
programme.desc: En medio de un desierto abrasador, Chip y los átomos se encontraron con un átomo de tungsteno que les brindó refugio bajo un edificio piramidal que, hasta hacía poco, contaba con un ingenioso sistema de refrigeración por el que circulaba una corriente de amoníaco en su sótano. Pero ahora, el Dr. No ha desviado el flujo de amoníaco para su propio beneficio. Chip descubre el punto donde se desvía el amoníaco y construye una presa que lo devuelve a su curso normal.

programme.desc: Robo needs to find Zitron and stop the dinosaur terrorising Car City before it causes any more chaos.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Stuck in Mud
programme.desc: Zitron blocked the road with mud, and cars are getting stuck! Rodeo and Booster merge in an attempt to stop him.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Flying Shark
programme.desc: It's Rodeo's birthday! Zitron's present—a flying shark—goes wild and turns on the guests. Robo comes to the rescue with Carrie's help.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Saving the Parade

Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.
